content: Backend: add occupation field to User schema + UpdateUserIn DTO
Backend: add personalized ranking to trend_scout (gender/profession/occupation/country)
Backend: wire optional auth into /trends/fashion-scout to apply ranking when user present
Frontend: add Occupation input to ProfileDetailsCard
Frontend: Home.jsx now fetches /fashion-scout?limit=4 (top 4 personalized cards)
Frontend: bump FashionScoutPanel to fetch ~30 cards (full daily set, filtered)
